chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5137 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.5230/2025 2. For orders on Misc. No.5231/2025 3. For orders on office objection No.1 4. For orders on Misc. No.22702/2024 5. For orders on Misc. No.22703/2024 6. For hearing of main case 10.03.2025 None present. 1. Urgent application is granted. 2-6. Present petition seeks to agitate issue of electricity bills etc. Prima facie the jurisdiction in this regards vests with the Electric Inspector. Even otherwise no case is discernible to consider the concerned respondent as person within the meaning of Article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
